items.question: What is the difference between a CV and a Resume?
items.answer: A CV (Curriculum Vitae) is a document that describes your entire educational and professional experience in detail. It is often used in academic and scientific fields. A resume is shorter (usually 1-2 pages) and contains the most important achievements, experience and skills for a specific position. On cvLab you can easily create both.

items.question: Is cvLab free to use?
items.answer: Yes, you can create and download 2 resumes completely free of charge. For subsequent resumes, you can wait 24 hours or upgrade to the Premium plan which offers unlimited access.

items.question: How to write a proper and professional CV?
items.answer: To write a professional CV: 1) Write a short and accurate summary about yourself. 2) List your experience in reverse chronological order. 3) Emphasize the skills most relevant to the desired position (ATS-friendly). 4) Fill in all important sections using the ready-made structure on the cvLab platform.

items.question: How safe is my data?
items.answer: Your data is secure. If you are not logged in, it will only be saved and processed temporarily in your browser's memory. If you log in, your resumes will be securely saved in your personal account in our cloud database, and you can edit them at any time.

items.question: Can ATS (Applicant Tracking Systems) read the downloaded PDF?
items.answer: Absolutely. Our templates use standard text flow and clean fonts, which ensures that company ATS systems can accurately recognize the text in your resume.

items.question: How to create a resume using a CV builder and get a ready template?
items.answer: cvLab is a modern CV builder and online resume platform. After entering the site, you'll be offered ready-made professional templates and resume samples. Fill in your details, create a free resume online and download the PDF in 3 minutes.
